title: True Fps
description: Focused fully on FPS boost – just pure Fabric optimization 🔥. For 1.21 - 1.21.8 and 1.20.x
body:
# 🚀 True Fps – FPS Boost Modpack for Fabric.


<details>
<summary>Update</summary>

**For Few Version Mod Modern fix and Rendering Api to support Sodium Indium**
- **INDIUM:  For 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.20 To 1.20.6**
- **MODERN FIX:  For 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.20 To 1.20.6**

</details>



**True FPS+** is a minimal modpack made **100% for FPS optimization** — no visuals, no PvP, no fluff.  
Includes the four most popular and powerful Fabric performance mods.

> 💻 **Get smooth gameplay even on 4GB RAM systems**  
> 🔥 Powered by Sodium, Lithium, Dynamic FPS & ImmediatelyFast

---

## 🎯 Key Features

- ✅ FPS-focused: no extra features or bloat  
- 🧠 Easy to use: no configs or settings to tweak  
- 📈 Stable performance: fewer lag spikes, improved frame consistency  
- ✔️ Compatible with Prism Launcher and Modrinth App

---

## 📦 Mods Included

- **Sodium** – High-performance rendering  
- **Lithium** – Game logic and ticking optimization  
- **Dynamic FPS** – Saves CPU when inactive  
- **ImmediatelyFast** – Boosts GPU frame processing  
+ **Fabric API** – Required Core Api

---

## 📁 How to Install

### 📌 Easy (via .mrpack)
- Download `.mrpack`  
- Open with Prism Launcher or Modrinth App  
- Click **Import** → Launch

### 🔧 Manual
- Go to https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/
- Download Modpack drag and select mrpack 
1. Convert `.mrpack` to `.zip`  
2. Extract and place the `.jar` files in `.minecraft/mods/`  
3. Ensure **Fabric Loader 0.16.3+** is installed

---

## 🧠 System Requirements

- 🔥 High: 8-core CPU, 8GB RAM = 200–400 FPS  
- ⚙️ Mid: 4-core CPU, 6GB RAM = 120–200 FPS  
- 🧊 Low: 2–4 core CPU, 4GB RAM = 60–100 FPS

---

> 🎮 Just launch and enjoy a smoother vanilla Minecraft experience!
